math-anything.description: Math Anything - Mathematical structure extraction for computational materials science

tools.name: extract_mathematical_structure
tools.description: Extract mathematical structure from simulation engine parameters. Returns canonical forms, variable dependencies, discretization schemes, solution strategies, approximations, and mathematical decoding.

tools.name: compare_calculations
tools.description: Compare two mathematical schemas and report differences categorized as critical, warning, or info.

tools.name: validate_constraints
tools.description: Report symbolic constraints present in a mathematical schema without judging their satisfaction.

tools.name: list_supported_engines
tools.description: List all supported simulation engines (vasp, lammps, abaqus, ansys, comsol, gromacs, multiwfn).
